case_title: LEE, SIMON H. DR. (BRIDGEWAY CHIROPRACTIC) VS CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,135.00 FILED BY LEE, SIMON H. DR. (BRIDGEWAY CHIROPRACTIC) AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION KOO, HOLLIE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MARVIN KOO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOO, HOLLIE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MARVIN KOO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
TRIAL BRIEF OF MARVIN KOO AND REQUEST FOR DIS- MISSAL FILED IN COURT BY DEFT, CAL. ST. AUTO ASSOC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SIMON H. DR. (BRIDGEWAY CHIROPRACTIC) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION KOO, HOLLIE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MARVIN KOO $1,135.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, THE COURT APPOINTS HOLLIE KOO, MOTHER OF MINOR CHILD MARVIN KOO AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MARVIN KOO. THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT PROPER NAME OF DEFT: HOLLIE KOO AS GUARDIAN FOR MARVIN KOO. DEFT. WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS. CALIF. STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE CASE #790384 FOR BRIEF FILED BY CA STATE AUTO ASSN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
